title: Write ferrum_extlib_dtls.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_dtls: DTLS 1.2 (RFC 6347) and DTLS 1.3 (RFC 9147) over UDP. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: DTLS handshake with cookie exchange (amplification prevention), per-source connection table, epoch key management, cipher suites matching TLS extlib, integration with net.UdpSocket, post-handshake read/write interface.
